'''âb-th-th-v''' ('''kabathevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:holystone|holystone]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-th-th-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:holystone|holystone]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-th-th-v
|-
! Lemma
| kabathevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibathevoko|thibathevoko]] || [[word:jibathevoko|jibathevoko]] || [[word:shibathevoko|shibathevoko]] || [[word:kibathevoko|kibathevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubathevoko|thuthubathevoko]] || [[word:jujubathevoko|jujubathevoko]] || [[word:shushubathevoko|shushubathevoko]] || [[word:kukubathevoko|kukubathevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubathevoko|thubathevoko]] || [[word:jubathevoko|jubathevoko]] || [[word:shubathevoko|shubathevoko]] || [[word:kubathevoko|kubathevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubathevoko|thubathevoko]] || [[word:jubathevoko|jubathevoko]] || [[word:shubathevoko|shubathevoko]] || [[word:kubathevoko|kubathevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebathevoko|thebathevoko]] || [[word:jebathevoko|jebathevoko]] || [[word:shebathevoko|shebathevoko]] || [[word:kebathevoko|kebathevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobathevoko|thothobathevoko]] || [[word:jojobathevoko|jojobathevoko]] || [[word:shoshobathevoko|shoshobathevoko]] || [[word:kokobathevoko|kokobathevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobathevoko|thobathevoko]] || [[word:jobathevoko|jobathevoko]] || [[word:shobathevoko|shobathevoko]] || [[word:kobathevoko|kobathevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobathevoko|thobathevoko]] || [[word:jobathevoko|jobathevoko]] || [[word:shobathevoko|shobathevoko]] || [[word:kobathevoko|kobathevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠbathevoko|thĂŠbathevoko]] || [[word:jĂŠbathevoko|jĂŠbathevoko]] || [[word:shĂŠbathevoko|shĂŠbathevoko]] || [[word:kĂŠbathevoko|kĂŠbathevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabathevoko|thathabathevoko]] || [[word:jajabathevoko|jajabathevoko]] || [[word:shashabathevoko|shashabathevoko]] || [[word:kakabathevoko|kakabathevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabathevoko|thabathevoko]] || [[word:jabathevoko|jabathevoko]] || [[word:shabathevoko|shabathevoko]] || [[word:kabathevoko|kabathevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabathevoko|thabathevoko]] || [[word:jabathevoko|jabathevoko]] || [[word:shabathevoko|shabathevoko]] || [[word:kabathevoko|kabathevoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
